task.description: Generate a greeting message in three different tones: formal, casual, and poetic. Synthesize the best elements into a single output.

phases.description: Spawn three workers, each producing a greeting in a different tone.

workers.command: python3 -c "print('Greetings and salutations. It is a pleasure to make your acquaintance.')"

rubric.description: Must include a greeting and introduction

workers.command: python3 -c "print('Hey there! Nice to meet you. Hope you are having an awesome day!')"
python3 -c "print('Like dawn breaking over silent hills, I greet you—stranger soon to be friend.')"

rubric.description: Must use metaphor or vivid imagery

phases.description: Merge the three greetings into a single message that blends all tones.

workers.command: python3 -c "print('Hello—whether you prefer formality, casual chat, or poetry, welcome aboard!')"

rubric.description: Must acknowledge all three source tones
